# Hüsnü Lübnan

Hüsnü Lübnan is a Senior Frontend Developer and Creative Technologist based in Turkey, specializing in high-performance web applications with Next.js, React, TypeScript, and advanced UI/UX engineering with Framer Motion and TailwindCSS.

## About

Hüsnü is a frontend developer with 4+ years of professional experience building enterprise-grade web applications. He bridges the gap between rigorous engineering and creative design, with a focus on performance, accessibility, and SEO optimization.

- Role: Senior Frontend Developer
- Location: Turkey (Remote / Global)
- Stack: JavaScript, TypeScript, Next.js (App Router), React Server Components, TailwindCSS, Framer Motion, Zustand, Redux Toolkit
- Specializations: Core Web Vitals Optimization, Micro Frontend Architecture, Design Systems, SEO Engineering

## Experience

- Nuevo Software House: Frontend Developer (June 2024 - Present) — Building enterprise platforms with Next.js micro frontend architecture for Koç Holding
- SHFT (Fizbot): Frontend Developer (Oct 2023 - June 2024) — PropTech platform with real-time map-based features, GraphQL, and Sentry monitoring
- NoNo Company: Frontend Developer (Sep 2022 - Oct 2023) — Multi-tenant CMS solutions for tourism and logistics with complex RBAC
- Appricot Software Agency: Frontend Developer (Mar 2022 - Sep 2022) — Agency work building responsive web applications
- Age Dijital Ajans: Frontend Developer (Mar 2021 - Mar 2022) — Started professional career building client websites and CMS platforms

## Projects

- [Otokoç 2. El](https://www.otokocikinciel.com/): Used car sales platform for Koç Holding. Micro frontend architecture with Next.js 14, Turbopack, OIDC Auth, Zustand. 100K+ monthly users with advanced SEO and security implementations.
- [Fizbot](https://fizbot.com/): Real estate intelligence platform. React, TypeScript, Apollo Client (GraphQL), Redux Toolkit, Sentry. Map-based opportunity matching for agents.
- [AI Todo App](https://github.com/hsnlbnan/next-js-fast-api-mongodb-ollama-todo): Full-stack AI-powered task management. Next.js + FastAPI + Ollama LLM + MongoDB. Real-time task summarization.
- [hayal.in](https://hayal.in): Anonymous dream sharing platform. Next.js, Vercel Edge Functions, Redis, Postgres. Edge-first architecture with real-time data handling.
- [Alterego CMS](https://husnu.dev): Multi-tenant CMS for tourism group. Next.js, Redux Toolkit Query, MUI, CASL for role-based access control across multiple domains.
- [Yeditepe GO](https://husnu.dev): Logistics tracking CMS. React, Redux Toolkit Query, Sass. Real-time shipment dashboard for one of Turkey's leading transport companies.
